name: L & L Bus Transportation
registry_source: Source-list address (56 Manson Libby Rd, Scarborough, ME 04074) resolves to the Scarborough Public Schools Transportation Department (public school district), not a private carrier; no matching private entity found in ME or NY registries via open sources
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate or data-quality issue). SAFER lookups for 'L & L BUS TRANSPORTATION', 'L & L BUS', and 'L AND L BUS' returned no records. Source row lists state=NY but address=Scarborough, ME 04074; that ME address (56 Manson Libby Rd) is the Scarborough School Bus Department (district-owned, not a contractor). A separate 'L&L Transportation LLC' exists in Hodgdon, ME (154 Calais Rd) offering NEMT/taxi/private-for-hire (no school bus service advertised) — likely NOT the same entity. Cannot confirm any tuck-in candidate at this name/address pairing.

notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER returned no records for 'IMPICCINI'. Family-owned PA school bus contractor founded 1969 by Jody Impiccini and his father; held contract with Beth Center School District. Legal entity name likely 'Impiccini Brothers School Buses, Inc.' per David Impiccini LinkedIn. Address: 73 Low Hill Rd, Brownsville, PA 15417 (Fayette County). Phone (724) 785-7784. Founder Jody Impiccini passed away 2025-10-17; succession to David Impiccini likely - tuck-in opportunity given founder transition.
